subject: Add generic Postgres set for DCAE
commit_message:
Add generic Postgres set for DCAE

DCAE postgres set is based on Crunchy Data Statefulset Helm Example.
It provides a statefulSet of two postgres replicas.
Remaining work: tweak services and PVs. Adjust the chart to
  DCAE needs.

Change-Id: Ic05f88fcde5c5967ebd93f944f953262df77d7c6
Issue-ID: OOM-853
Signed-off-by: BorislavG <Borislav.Glozman@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

(4 comments)

please change the requested items

Patch Set 2:

(6 comments)

a few minor copyright issues

Patch Set 2:

Took a quick spin with the changes.  Some early verification feedback:
- Something funny going on with pv and pvcs.  It seems that pg-data-1 is being claimed by pod pg-0 and pv pg-data-0 has no claim.
- the default persistence enabled: false results in nothing spinning up.  I would have expected it to come up with the data in a disposable state.


==> v1/PersistentVolume
NAME                CAPACITY  ACCESS MODES  RECLAIM POLICY  STATUS     CLAIM                                  STORAGECLASS       REASON  AGE
dev-postgres-data1  1Gi       RWO           Retain          Bound      onap/dev-postgres-data-dev-postgres-0  dev-postgres-data  1s
dev-postgres-data0  1Gi       RWO           Retain          Available  dev-postgres-data                      1s

==> v1/Service
NAME           TYPE       CLUSTER-IP    EXTERNAL-IP  PORT(S)   AGE
pgset          ClusterIP  10.43.14.34   <none>       5432/TCP  1s
pgset-primary  ClusterIP  10.43.75.192  <none>       5432/TCP  1s
pgset-replica  ClusterIP  10.43.114.87  <none>       5432/TCP  1s

==> v1beta1/StatefulSet
NAME          DESIRED  CURRENT  AGE
dev-postgres  2        1        1s

Patch Set 2:

- the first replica is crashing out:
/opt/cpm/bin/start.sh: line 21: /pgdata/dev-postgres-0/trap.output: No such file or directory
pg_ctl: directory "/pgdata/dev-postgres-0" does not exist

---------

            dev-postgres-data1   1Gi        RWO            Retain           Bound       onap/dev-postgres-data-dev-postgres-0   dev-postgres-data             9m
